name: Chinese Cooking Club
description: A weekly cooking group where we take turns making dishes from different regions of China. Great way to eat well and make friends! All skill levels welcome.
descriptionZh: 每周轮流做中国各地的菜。一起吃好吃的，一起交朋友！任何厨艺水平都欢迎。

name: CS Study Group
description: Study group for CS graduate students. We work through problem sets together, prepare for interviews, and share resources. Collaborative, not competitive.
descriptionZh: CS研究生学习小组。一起做题、准备面试、分享资源。互相帮助，不是竞争。

name: Hiking Explorers
description: Biweekly hiking trips to trails near campus and beyond. Carpooling available. Perfect for getting off campus and enjoying nature.
descriptionZh: 每两周一次的徒步旅行，探索校园附近和更远的步道。有拼车。放松身心，亲近自然。
meetingScheduleZh: 隔周日 上午9点-下午3点

name: Faith & Life Conversations
description: A safe, open space to explore life's big questions together. No pressure, just honest conversation. Snacks provided!
descriptionZh: 一个安全、开放的空间，一起探讨人生的大问题。没有压力，只有真诚的对话。有零食！

name: Photography Walks
description: Monthly photography walks around the city. Share tips, explore new spots, and build your portfolio. Phone cameras totally welcome!
descriptionZh: 每月一次的城市摄影漫步。分享技巧，探索新地点，丰富你的作品集。手机拍照完全欢迎！
meetingScheduleZh: 每月第一个周六 下午2-5点

name: English Conversation Corner
description: Practice English in a relaxed, friendly setting with native speakers and other international students. Topics change weekly.
descriptionZh: 在轻松友好的环境中和母语者及其他国际学生练习英语口语。每周更换话题。
